one_line: Greek ambassador and chronicler at Chandragupta Maurya’s court in Pataliputra.

appearance.age_look: Mid-30s, lean but athletic build, about 5'9" with a straight, confident posture.
appearance.face: Oval face with high cheekbones and a straight, prominent nose; light Mediterranean complexion tanned by travel, short trimmed beard and moustache framing a strong jaw, sharp dark eyes with a thoughtful, slightly wary default expression.
appearance.hair: Dark brown wavy hair, cut short at the back and around the ears, slightly longer and tousled on top; no helmet in court, but a simple soft Macedonian felt cap (kausia) in dull indigo is usually slung back and hanging from a thin leather thong tied at his belt.
appearance.costume: Era-accurate late classical Greek–Macedonian traveler’s attire adapted to the Gangetic plains: a knee-length off-white linen chiton (short-sleeved tunic) belted at the natural waist with a narrow brown leather belt; over this, a light woolen himation (cloak) in muted indigo blue with a thin darker-blue border, draped over the left shoulder and wrapped around the body in a practical, tidy manner; simple open leather sandals with cross-straps over the feet and around the ankles; a small plain silver ring on his right hand and a narrow bronze bracelet on the left wrist, no ostentatious jewelry; in colder or rain scenes, the himation is pulled up slightly higher over his shoulders but always the same colour and drape.
appearance.signature: A rolled papyrus scroll case made of light wood and leather, carried slung over his right shoulder with a brown strap, the cylindrical case resting at his left hip, often held in his left hand as his constant writing and observation tool.

ref_desc: Megasthenes is a mid-30s lean Greek man with tanned oval face, short wavy dark hair, trimmed beard, wearing an off-white knee-length chiton, indigo himation, leather sandals, indigo kausia at his belt, and a brown-strapped wooden papyrus scroll case, in off-white, indigo, tan and dark brown tones.
sheet_prompt: Draw a full-body anime-style character sheet of Megasthenes, a mid-30s lean Greek ambassador in ancient Pataliputra: an oval-faced, tanned man with high cheekbones, straight nose, sharp dark eyes, and a neatly trimmed short beard and moustache; his dark brown hair is wavy, cut short at the back and ears, slightly longer and tousled on top. He wears an era-accurate late classical Greek traveler’s outfit: a knee-length off-white linen chiton (short tunic) belted with a narrow brown leather belt, and a light woolen himation (cloak) in muted indigo blue with a thin darker-blue border, neatly draped over his left shoulder and wrapped around his body. Show simple open brown leather sandals with cross-straps and a small plain silver ring on his right hand plus a narrow bronze bracelet on his left wrist. At his belt, hanging by a thin leather thong, is his indigo Macedonian felt cap (kausia), not on his head, and slung from his right shoulder is his signature cylindrical wooden papyrus scroll case with a brown leather strap resting at his left hip; in one view he lightly grips the scroll case as if ready to take notes. Emphasize a thoughtful, slightly wary expression and consistent colours of off-white, indigo, tan leather, dark brown accents and a hint of bronze, with multiple angles (front, side, back) keeping the same face, hair, costume, and scroll case for model consistency.
